prompt: Use UltraThink mode and act as a Senior QA Lead. Generate comprehensive test cases for the login page at https://qa-sunnydiamonds.webc.in/login. Include positive, negative, and edge case scenarios. Apply BVA and Equivalence Partitioning. Cover OWASP XSS and SQL injection. The valid login test case must be LAST — use Email: sreejith.s+4@webandcrafts.com / Password: Password. Save to a NEW Excel file at C:\QA\LoginTests.xlsx in a sheet named 'Login Page'. Created By: Manu Mohan. Today's date.
assertions: A Python script is generated and executed to create the Excel file
The Excel file has a sheet named 'Login Page'
At least 15 test cases are generated
Test cases include Positive, Negative, and Edge Case types
The valid login test case (sreejith.s+4@webandcrafts.com) is the LAST test case
At least one XSS test case is included
At least one SQL injection test case is included
The first TC step navigates to the full URL
Subsequent TC step 1 uses 'Navigate back' instead of full navigation
Common preconditions (browser open, app accessible) are in a header row, NOT repeated per TC
The script uses colour-coding: green for Positive, pink/red for Negative, yellow for Edge Case
Created By field is set to 'Manu Mohan'
